description: Automates builder.toml version updates (CNB lifecycle + pinned Paketo buildpacks) that Dependabot cannot track. All other ecosystems are handled by .github/dependabot.yml.

customManagers.description: CNB lifecycle version in [lifecycle] section of builder.toml. Release tags on GitHub use a 'v' prefix (v0.21.7) which extractVersionTemplate strips so the stored value (0.21.7) matches correctly.

Pinned Paketo buildpack URI versions in [[buildpacks]] sections (e.g. docker://docker.io/paketobuildpacks/procfile:5.13.1). Buildpacks without an explicit tag (always-latest) are intentionally excluded by requiring the colon separator.
Procfile buildpack version in [[order.group]] – must stay in sync with the [[buildpacks]] uri tag above. Renovate groups both into the same PR via the 'builder.toml versions' packageRule.
